name: Cold Email Metrics - Daily Performance Tracker

nodes.name: Query Lead Status Counts
nodes.notes: Fetches all leads with status field to count by status (new, contacted, replied, positive, demo_booked, converted, bounced)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ context_key: 'email_metrics', context_value: JSON.stringify($json), updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'chore: update cold email metrics ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], content: Buffer.from(JSON.stringify($json, null, 2)).toString('base64'), sha: '' }) }}

nodes.name: Write Report to GitHub
nodes.notes: First run will need to use POST to create the file. Subsequent runs use PUT with SHA. continueOnFail handles gracefully.
